name: Northbeam Multi-Touch Attribution API
what_it_does: Northbeam multi-touch attribution and media analytics REST API for DTC brands and e-commerce companies to measure true advertising ROI across channels with server-side tracking, media mix modeling, and creative analytics that survive iOS privacy changes and cookie deprecation. Enables AI agents to manage attribution data retrieval for DTC media performance automation, handle cross-channel attribution reporting for paid media optimization automation, access media mix modeling results for budget allocation automation, retrieve creative performance analytics for ad creative optimization automation, manage customer journey tracking for conversion path analysis automation, handle cohort analysis for customer retention analytics automation, access custom metric and channel grouping for tailored reporting automation, retrieve real-time ad spend efficiency for in-flight campaign optimization automation, manage server-side tracking configuration for privacy-resilient attribution automation, and integrate Northbeam with Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok, Snapchat, and DTC platforms for end-to-end attribution automation.
use_cases: Measuring true ROAS across channels from DTC media efficiency agents
Allocating ad budget with media mix modeling from budget optimization agents
Analyzing creative performance from paid social ad optimization agents
Tracking conversion paths from customer journey intelligence agents
not_for: Small DTC brands (Northbeam is enterprise-priced for $5M+ ad spend brands)
B2B SaaS analytics (Northbeam is DTC/ecommerce specific)
Marketing data warehousing (use Supermetrics or Funnel.io for broad data pipelines)
best_when: A DTC brand with significant ad spend wanting AI agents to automate multi-touch attribution measurement, media mix modeling, and creative analytics through Northbeam's privacy-resilient server-side tracking.
avoid_when: MINIMUM AD SPEND THRESHOLD: Northbeam is designed for brands with $5M+ annual ad spend; smaller brands have insufficient data volume for statistically valid attribution models; automated Northbeam integration for low-spend brands creates unreliable attribution results. SERVER-SIDE TRACKING SETUP REQUIRED: Northbeam server-side tracking requires technical implementation (server event sending, pixel installation); automated attribution depends on correct server-side event configuration; automated Northbeam integration without server-side setup creates browser-only tracking with iOS/cookie limitations. API ACCESS REQUIRES ENTERPRISE PLAN: Northbeam API access is enterprise-tier only; automated API integration for non-enterprise customers creates unauthorized access; automated data pipeline requires Northbeam sales engagement for API enablement. MODEL TRAINING DATA LATENCY: Northbeam media mix models require sufficient historical data (3-6 months) before reliable recommendations; automated budget allocation from Northbeam immediately after onboarding creates model-insufficient recommendations.

auth.notes: Northbeam uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2019 by Rishabh Jain and Kyle Dorman. Backed by Felicis, Matrix Partners ($18.5M raised). Products: Multi-touch attribution, media mix modeling, creative analytics, server-side tracking. No webhooks (pull-based). GDPR. SOC2. Competes with Triple Whale and Rockerbox for DTC attribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process required
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing based on ad spend; typically $2,000-$10,000+/month
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Felicis backed. Enterprise pricing based on managed ad spend. Annual contract typical.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; analytics and attribution queries throttled; no real-time webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: API DOCUMENTATION NOT PUBLIC: Northbeam API documentation is not publicly available; automated integration requires Northbeam customer success engagement for API access and documentation; automated self-service integration without customer portal access creates undocumented endpoint discovery challenge

ATTRIBUTION MODEL SELECTION AFFECTS RESULTS: Northbeam supports multiple attribution models (data-driven, last-click, linear); automated reporting must specify consistent attribution model; automated comparison of metrics across different attribution models creates misleading channel performance comparison

DATA FRESHNESS LATENCY FOR ATTRIBUTION: Northbeam attribution data updates on scheduled cycle (typically 3-6 hours); automated real-time performance optimization on Northbeam data creates decisions based on stale attribution; automated in-flight bid optimization should check data freshness timestamp

CREATIVE ANALYTICS REQUIRES ASSET NAMING CONVENTION: Northbeam creative analytics segments by ad creative identifiers; automated creative performance analysis requires consistent naming convention in ad platforms; automated creative analysis with inconsistent naming creates unidentifiable creative segments

SERVER-SIDE EVENT SCHEMA VALIDATION: Northbeam server-side events require specific schema (order_id, revenue, channel); automated event sending must validate schema before sending; automated malformed event sending creates attribution data gaps without explicit error notification
agent_readiness.security_notes: DTC attribution. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Ad attribution and ecommerce performance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: DTC analytics. GDPR, SOC2. API key. US. Attribution and ecommerce data.
